hero.subtitle: We provide professional import services from China and Dubai to Algeria. Full support from sourcing suppliers to final delivery, with quality assurance and competitive prices.

about.title: Who We Are
about.desc1: We are an Algerian team specialized in import services from China and Dubai. We provide comprehensive solutions for traders and entrepreneurs seeking high-quality products at competitive prices.
about.desc2: We built an integrated platform combining local expertise and a strong international network to deliver a smooth and reliable import experience.

expertise.chinaDesc: Direct access to the best manufacturers and suppliers in China. We handle all product types with quality assurance.
expertise.dubaiDesc: Leverage Dubai's strategic location for high-quality products within just 48 hours. Fast and reliable shipping.
expertise.sourcingDesc: Find trusted suppliers and secure the best prices. We handle both small and large quantities.

mission.title: Our Mission: Reliable & Guaranteed Imports
mission.desc: We aim to simplify the import process for Algerian traders with comprehensive and transparent solutions. We refuse counterfeit or low-quality products. Our goal is to build genuine trust and provide guarantees that protect both traders and buyers.

whyUs.title: Why Choose WATINEX?
whyUs.subtitle: Choosing to work with us means choosing a strong and experienced partner:
whyUs.item1: Trusted supplier network in China and Dubai
whyUs.item2: Professional team ready to scale anytime
whyUs.item6: Complete follow-up from order to delivery

servicesDetail.title: Our Services
servicesDetail.chinaF1: Direct access to manufacturers and suppliers.
servicesDetail.chinaF4: Sea and air freight with full tracking.
servicesDetail.sourcingF3: Test new products in small quantities.
servicesDetail.logisticsF4: Full coordination between client and courier.
servicesDetail.consultDesc: Free consultation with an expert to choose products, improve offers, and provide logistics advice.
servicesDetail.reportsDesc: Detailed daily report including confirmation rates, delivery stats, cancellation reasons, and improvement recommendations.

contactCTA.title: Ready to Start Importing?
contactCTA.subtitle: Contact us today for a free consultation. Your orders deserve professional and scalable management.

footer.tagline: Integrated import platform from China and Dubai to Algeria.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.text1: Excellent and fast service! I imported electronics from China and the quality exceeded my expectations.
testimonials.text2: Very professional. They helped me find the best suppliers and competitive prices.
testimonials.text3: Thanks to their services I successfully started my project. Support is continuous and shipping is fast.

landing.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about importing with Watinex
landing.faqQ1: What are your shipping times from China?
landing.faqA1: From Dubai: 48-hour delivery. From China: varies by shipping type, with full tracking.
landing.faqA2: Yes, we provide comprehensive import and delivery follow-up until arrival.
landing.faqA3: We focus on e-commerce products from China and Dubai to Algeria.
landing.faqQ4: How do I track my shipment?
landing.faqA4: You get continuous updates via WhatsApp until delivery.
landing.faqA5: We offer flexible payment options suitable for all levels.

leadRequest.title: Request Access
leadRequest.subtitle: Enter your phone and choose your importer profile.
leadRequest.tierBeginnerDesc: Starting out or small trial orders
leadRequest.successBody: We received your details. We will contact you within {hours} hours.
leadRequest.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

booking.pageSubtitle: Complete the steps below to process your request.
booking.serviceShipping: I have products ready, I just need shipping
booking.confirmBeforeSubmit: I confirm that all information above is correct and ready for manual confirmation.
booking.privacyNote: Your information is used only to respond to your request.
booking.successBody: Your registration is pending manual confirmation. We will contact you within 6 to 8 hours. The consultation is 100% free.
